name: Deathwood
concept: A gritty mature RPG set in 1880's wild west. You arrive in town with a dream and a few coins. Find lodging, find work, find your way in a deadwood and tombstone style game with dark and gritty vibes and realistic storylines. Real npc's with lives and wishes and wants, realistic job system and depth.
